articles.title: Govt expands scope of GATC, enables verification of CNG, LNG and hydrogen dispensers
articles.description: The Centre has amended the Legal Metrology (Government Approved Test Centre) Rules, 2013, to expand verification infrastructure for weights and measures. Five new fuel dispensing systems, including CNG, LNG, and hydrogen, have been added to the GATC framework. This move aims to enhance verification services, improve efficiency, and support the adoption of cleaner fuels across India.

articles.title: How US government’s chip shortage problem may be ‘good news for’ Anthropic which it has designated ‘national security threat’
articles.description: Facing a severe computer chip shortage, US intelligence agencies are increasing their reliance on AI firm Anthropic, despite its blacklisting as a national security threat. A $9 billion emergency fund aims to secure advanced semiconductors for AI models on classified networks, crucial for sifting through vast data and countering foreign adversaries like China.

articles.title: TIAA CEO Thasunda Brown Duckett gives Gen Z 3 rules for building a career in the AI era
articles.description: The traditional career ladder is shifting. Automation is impacting entry-level jobs, increasing competition. Young professionals face new challenges. TIAA CEO Thasunda Brown Duckett offers strategies for success. These include continuous learning, embracing unique backgrounds, and building opportunities for others. This approach helps navigate a dynamic workforce and build lasting careers.

articles.title: Delta CEO Ed Bastian asked AI to write his speech and then threw it away
articles.description: Delta CEO Ed Bastian found AI-generated speeches lacked human spirit, opting for a handwritten approach. This highlights a growing workplace dilemma: algorithmic efficiency versus authentic human expression. Over-reliance on automation risks diluting unique perspectives, leading to homogenized outputs and stifled innovation. True professionalism now hinges on irreplaceable human soft skills and genuine connection.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs CEO says AI will change jobs but mass unemployment fears are overblown
articles.description: Generative software is reducing entry-level roles, causing anxiety for young professionals. While some fear job collapse, leaders like Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon believe automation will free workers for complex tasks, leading to an evolutionary leap. However, critics warn of a trap if automation only replaces jobs without creating new value, potentially leading to lower participation and meaningless roles.

articles.title: Apple's sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features are now available in India
articles.description: Apple has announced the expansion of sleep apnea notifications and hearing test features to India. Sleep apnea is a condition in which a person's breathing momentarily stops during sleep, preventing the body from getting enough oxygen. If left untreated, it can lead to health consequences over time, including increased risk of hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and cardiac issues. Apple Watch helps its users detect signs of sleep apnea. It's done with the help of an Apple Watch metric called Breathing Disturbances, which uses the smartwatch's accelerometer to detect small movements at the...

articles.title: These premium desk accessories completely upgraded my setup [Video]
articles.description: Desk setups are ever evolving. Because so much of our workflow and desk revolves around tech, which changes constantly, the products we use every day naturally change alongside it. But one thing I’ve noticed over the years is that when I invest a little more in premium accessories, they tend to last much longer. There will always be a place for budget-conscious products, but the accessories I keep coming back to are usually well-built, thoughtfully designed, and that improve my overall workflow. I wanted to share some of my favorite premium desk accessories that would benefit anyone’s setup, whether for gaming, work, or leisure. more...

articles.title: Virtual Assistants Are Getting Supercharged with AI, and Clients Are Loving It
articles.description: New Delhi [India], May 23: Spend an hour with an independent consultant in North America and a pattern shows up fast. The hours billed are not the problem. The hours not billed are. Proposals, follow-ups, decks, invoices, social media, the half-finished landing page, the tax document the accountant asked for three weeks ago. Most independent consultants do not have a revenue problem. They have an admin problem dressed up as a revenue problem.
